instructions: Prioritize correctness, behavioral regressions, security, performance, cross-package integration, and missing regression tests over style nits. Do not spend review budget on formatting, import ordering, or lint-only issues already enforced by Prettier or ESLint unless they hide a real bug.

files.description: Repository workflow guidance and high-signal engineering constraints.
Architecture and design rationale for the core library and docs app.

other.content: This repository is a PNPM monorepo with packages/core, packages/core-wasm, packages/react, packages/color-kit, and apps/docs. Public API changes often require matching barrel exports, downstream package updates, and docs/demo sync in the same PR.

The repo already has dedicated lint, format, and CI automation. High-signal reviews focus on logic bugs, flaky or ambiguous workflow behavior, stale snippets or demos, missing export plumbing, and missing regression coverage.

rules.rule: When a PR changes public exports or runtime entry points in packages/core, packages/react, packages/core-wasm, or packages/color-kit, verify the relevant barrel exports, downstream consumers, and build/test wiring are updated in the same PR.
When docs demos or API snippets change, check that the visible demo source, copied snippet, and any sync/check scripts still agree so docs do not teach stale code.

For workflow, script, or agent-automation changes, focus on deterministic command ordering, explicit dry-run or approval boundaries, and whether required status checks still reflect the intended merge gates.
